violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. A plastic to bowl was being used to scoop semolina from a container in the stockroom. This needs to be a durable material with a handle.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Duct tape was holding on the gasket to the door for the walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Duct tape was placed where handles used to be on the doors across from the flat grill. Foil tape was placed on a knife handle below the black freezer.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Plates in the dispenser across from the flat grill were not inverted.--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Cutting knives were being stored in a wooden block. This could not be fully cleaned and sanitized.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper plates across from the pizza oven on the top shelf were not inverted.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
